description: Minimal dashboard with only vital vulnerability stats by image and severity.
title: Trivy Vulnerability Essentials

451a6f52-0e99-468a-8719-42b08d2f6bd4.description: Filter dashboard by container image name
451a6f52-0e99-468a-8719-42b08d2f6bd4.name: container.image.name

widgets.description: Total unique vulnerabilities found in selected time range

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: WITH latest_scan_per_image AS (SELECT coalesce(nullIf(attributes_string['container.image.name'], ''), nullIf(attributes_string['image'], ''), 'unknown') AS image, max(timestamp) AS latest_ts FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE ts_bucket_start BETWEEN $start_timestamp - 1800 AND $end_timestamp AND timestamp >= $start_timestamp_nano AND timestamp <= $end_timestamp_nano AND resource.`service.name`::String = 'trivy-scan' AND attributes_string['event.name'] = 'security.scan.summary' AND attributes_string['event.domain'] = 'security' AND (has(splitByChar(',', replaceAll(replaceAll(replaceAll(toString($container.image.name), '[', ''), ']', ''), '\'', '')), '__all__') OR has(splitByChar(',', replaceAll(replaceAll(replaceAll(toString($container.image.name), '[', ''), ']', ''), '\'', '')), '__all_') OR has(splitByChar(',', replaceAll(replaceAll(replaceAll(toString($container.image.name), '[', ''), ']', ''), '\'', '')), coalesce(nullIf(attributes_string['container.image.name'], ''), nullIf(attributes_string['image'], ''), 'unknown'))) GROUP BY image) SELECT toFloat64(count()) AS value, now() AS ts FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 l INNER JOIN latest_scan_per_image s ON coalesce(nullIf(l.attributes_string['container.image.name'], ''), nullIf(l.attributes_string['image'], ''), 'unknown') = s.image AND l.timestamp = s.latest_ts WHERE l.ts_bucket_start BETWEEN $start_timestamp - 1800 AND $end_timestamp AND l.resource.`service.name`::String = 'trivy-scan' AND l.attributes_string['event.name'] = 'security.vulnerability' AND l.attributes_string['event.domain'] = 'security'

widgets.title: Total Vulnerabilities

widgets.description: Unique medium severity vulnerabilities in selected time range

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: WITH latest_scan_per_image AS (SELECT coalesce(nullIf(attributes_string['container.image.name'], ''), nullIf(attributes_string['image'], ''), 'unknown') AS image, max(timestamp) AS latest_ts FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE ts_bucket_start BETWEEN $start_timestamp - 1800 AND $end_timestamp AND timestamp >= $start_timestamp_nano AND timestamp <= $end_timestamp_nano AND resource.`service.name`::String = 'trivy-scan' AND attributes_string['event.name'] = 'security.scan.summary' AND attributes_string['event.domain'] = 'security' AND (has(splitByChar(',', replaceAll(replaceAll(replaceAll(toString($container.image.name), '[', ''), ']', ''), '\'', '')), '__all__') OR has(splitByChar(',', replaceAll(replaceAll(replaceAll(toString($container.image.name), '[', ''), ']', ''), '\'', '')), '__all_') OR has(splitByChar(',', replaceAll(replaceAll(replaceAll(toString($container.image.name), '[', ''), ']', ''), '\'', '')), coalesce(nullIf(attributes_string['container.image.name'], ''), nullIf(attributes_string['image'], ''), 'unknown'))) GROUP BY image) SELECT toFloat64(count()) AS value, now() AS ts FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 l INNER JOIN latest_scan_per_image s ON coalesce(nullIf(l.attributes_string['container.image.name'], ''), nullIf(l.attributes_string['image'], ''), 'unknown') = s.image AND l.timestamp = s.latest_ts WHERE l.ts_bucket_start BETWEEN $start_timestamp - 1800 AND $end_timestamp AND l.resource.`service.name`::String = 'trivy-scan' AND l.attributes_string['event.name'] = 'security.vulnerability' AND l.attributes_string['event.domain'] = 'security' AND upper(coalesce(nullIf(l.attributes_string['severity'], ''), nullIf(l.attributes_string['vulnerability.severity'], ''), nullIf(l.severity_text, ''), 'UNKNOWN')) = 'MEDIUM'

widgets.title: Medium

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: WITH latest_scan_per_image AS (SELECT coalesce(nullIf(attributes_string['container.image.name'], ''), nullIf(attributes_string['image'], ''), 'unknown') AS image, max(timestamp) AS latest_ts FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE ts_bucket_start BETWEEN $start_timestamp - 1800 AND $end_timestamp AND timestamp >= $start_timestamp_nano AND timestamp <= $end_timestamp_nano AND resource.`service.name`::String = 'trivy-scan' AND attributes_string['event.name'] = 'security.scan.summary' AND attributes_string['event.domain'] = 'security' AND (has(splitByChar(',', replaceAll(replaceAll(replaceAll(toString($container.image.name), '[', ''), ']', ''), '\'', '')), '__all__') OR has(splitByChar(',', replaceAll(replaceAll(replaceAll(toString($container.image.name), '[', ''), ']', ''), '\'', '')), '__all_') OR has(splitByChar(',', replaceAll(replaceAll(replaceAll(toString($container.image.name), '[', ''), ']', ''), '\'', '')), coalesce(nullIf(attributes_string['container.image.name'], ''), nullIf(attributes_string['image'], ''), 'unknown'))) GROUP BY image) SELECT toFloat64(count()) AS value, now() AS ts FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 l INNER JOIN latest_scan_per_image s ON coalesce(nullIf(l.attributes_string['container.image.name'], ''), nullIf(l.attributes_string['image'], ''), 'unknown') = s.image AND l.timestamp = s.latest_ts WHERE l.ts_bucket_start BETWEEN $start_timestamp - 1800 AND $end_timestamp AND l.resource.`service.name`::String = 'trivy-scan' AND l.attributes_string['event.name'] = 'security.vulnerability' AND l.attributes_string['event.domain'] = 'security' AND upper(coalesce(nullIf(l.attributes_string['severity'], ''), nullIf(l.attributes_string['vulnerability.severity'], ''), nullIf(l.severity_text, ''), 'UNKNOWN')) = 'CRITICAL'

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: WITH latest_scan_per_image AS (SELECT coalesce(nullIf(attributes_string['container.image.name'], ''), nullIf(attributes_string['image'], ''), 'unknown') AS image, max(timestamp) AS latest_ts FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE ts_bucket_start BETWEEN $start_timestamp - 1800 AND $end_timestamp AND timestamp >= $start_timestamp_nano AND timestamp <= $end_timestamp_nano AND resource.`service.name`::String = 'trivy-scan' AND attributes_string['event.name'] = 'security.scan.summary' AND attributes_string['event.domain'] = 'security' AND (has(splitByChar(',', replaceAll(replaceAll(replaceAll(toString($container.image.name), '[', ''), ']', ''), '\'', '')), '__all__') OR has(splitByChar(',', replaceAll(replaceAll(replaceAll(toString($container.image.name), '[', ''), ']', ''), '\'', '')), '__all_') OR has(splitByChar(',', replaceAll(replaceAll(replaceAll(toString($container.image.name), '[', ''), ']', ''), '\'', '')), coalesce(nullIf(attributes_string['container.image.name'], ''), nullIf(attributes_string['image'], ''), 'unknown'))) GROUP BY image) SELECT toFloat64(count()) AS value, now() AS ts FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 l INNER JOIN latest_scan_per_image s ON coalesce(nullIf(l.attributes_string['container.image.name'], ''), nullIf(l.attributes_string['image'], ''), 'unknown') = s.image AND l.timestamp = s.latest_ts WHERE l.ts_bucket_start BETWEEN $start_timestamp - 1800 AND $end_timestamp AND l.resource.`service.name`::String = 'trivy-scan' AND l.attributes_string['event.name'] = 'security.vulnerability' AND l.attributes_string['event.domain'] = 'security' AND upper(coalesce(nullIf(l.attributes_string['severity'], ''), nullIf(l.attributes_string['vulnerability.severity'], ''), nullIf(l.severity_text, ''), 'UNKNOWN')) = 'HIGH'

widgets.description: Detailed vulnerability rows mapped to image, with status, versions, and reference URL.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: WITH latest_scan_per_image AS (SELECT coalesce(nullIf(attributes_string['container.image.name'], ''), nullIf(attributes_string['image'], ''), 'unknown') AS image, max(timestamp) AS latest_ts FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE ts_bucket_start BETWEEN $start_timestamp - 1800 AND $end_timestamp AND timestamp >= $start_timestamp_nano AND timestamp <= $end_timestamp_nano AND resource.`service.name`::String = 'trivy-scan' AND attributes_string['event.name'] = 'security.scan.summary' AND attributes_string['event.domain'] = 'security' AND (has(splitByChar(',', replaceAll(replaceAll(replaceAll(toString($container.image.name), '[', ''), ']', ''), '\'', '')), '__all__') OR has(splitByChar(',', replaceAll(replaceAll(replaceAll(toString($container.image.name), '[', ''), ']', ''), '\'', '')), '__all_') OR has(splitByChar(',', replaceAll(replaceAll(replaceAll(toString($container.image.name), '[', ''), ']', ''), '\'', '')), coalesce(nullIf(attributes_string['container.image.name'], ''), nullIf(attributes_string['image'], ''), 'unknown'))) GROUP BY image) SELECT fromUnixTimestamp64Nano(max(l.timestamp)) AS "Last Seen", coalesce(nullIf(l.attributes_string['container.image.name'], ''), nullIf(l.attributes_string['image'], ''), 'unknown') AS "Image", coalesce(nullIf(l.attributes_string['library'], ''), nullIf(l.attributes_string['package.name'], ''), nullIf(l.attributes_string['package'], '')) AS "Library", coalesce(nullIf(l.attributes_string['vulnerability.id'], ''), nullIf(l.attributes_string['vulnerability_id'], '')) AS "Vulnerability", upper(coalesce(nullIf(l.attributes_string['severity'], ''), nullIf(l.attributes_string['vulnerability.severity'], ''), nullIf(l.severity_text, ''), 'UNKNOWN')) AS "Severity", coalesce(nullIf(l.attributes_string['vulnerability.status'], ''), nullIf(l.attributes_string['status'], ''), 'unknown') AS "Status", coalesce(nullIf(l.attributes_string['installed_version'], ''), nullIf(l.attributes_string['package.version'], '')) AS "Installed Version", coalesce(nullIf(l.attributes_string['fixed_version'], ''), '') AS "Fixed Version", coalesce(nullIf(l.attributes_string['vulnerability.title'], ''), nullIf(l.attributes_string['title'], ''), '') AS "Title", coalesce(nullIf(l.attributes_string['vulnerability.reference'], ''), nullIf(l.attributes_string['primary_url'], ''), '') AS "URL", count() AS "Occurrences" FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 l INNER JOIN latest_scan_per_image s ON coalesce(nullIf(l.attributes_string['container.image.name'], ''), nullIf(l.attributes_string['image'], ''), 'unknown') = s.image AND l.timestamp = s.latest_ts WHERE l.ts_bucket_start BETWEEN $start_timestamp - 1800 AND $end_timestamp AND l.resource.`service.name`::String = 'trivy-scan' AND l.attributes_string['event.name'] = 'security.vulnerability' AND l.attributes_string['event.domain'] = 'security' AND (has(splitByChar(',', replaceAll(replaceAll(replaceAll(toString($container.image.name), '[', ''), ']', ''), '\'', '')), '__all__') OR has(splitByChar(',', replaceAll(replaceAll(replaceAll(toString($container.image.name), '[', ''), ']', ''), '\'', '')), '__all_') OR has(splitByChar(',', replaceAll(replaceAll(replaceAll(toString($container.image.name), '[', ''), ']', ''), '\'', '')), coalesce(nullIf(l.attributes_string['container.image.name'], ''), nullIf(l.attributes_string['image'], ''), 'unknown'))) AND (has(splitByChar(',', replaceAll(replaceAll(replaceAll(toString($severity), '[', ''), ']', ''), '\'', '')), '__all__') OR has(splitByChar(',', replaceAll(replaceAll(replaceAll(toString($severity), '[', ''), ']', ''), '\'', '')), '__all_') OR has(splitByChar(',', replaceAll(replaceAll(replaceAll(toString($severity), '[', ''), ']', ''), '\'', '')), upper(coalesce(nullIf(l.attributes_string['severity'], ''), nullIf(l.attributes_string['vulnerability.severity'], ''), nullIf(l.severity_text, ''), 'UNKNOWN')))) GROUP BY "Image", "Library", "Vulnerability", "Severity", "Status", "Installed Version", "Fixed Version", "Title", "URL" ORDER BY "Image" ASC, "Severity" DESC LIMIT 300

widgets.title: Latest Vulnerabilities by Image (Detailed)

widgets.description: Vulnerability findings per image from each image's latest scan event.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: WITH latest_scan_per_image AS (SELECT coalesce(nullIf(attributes_string['container.image.name'], ''), nullIf(attributes_string['image'], ''), 'unknown') AS image, max(timestamp) AS latest_ts FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE ts_bucket_start BETWEEN $start_timestamp - 1800 AND $end_timestamp AND timestamp >= $start_timestamp_nano AND timestamp <= $end_timestamp_nano AND resource.`service.name`::String = 'trivy-scan' AND attributes_string['event.name'] = 'security.scan.summary' AND attributes_string['event.domain'] = 'security' AND (has(splitByChar(',', replaceAll(replaceAll(replaceAll(toString($container.image.name), '[', ''), ']', ''), '\'', '')), '__all__') OR has(splitByChar(',', replaceAll(replaceAll(replaceAll(toString($container.image.name), '[', ''), ']', ''), '\'', '')), '__all_') OR has(splitByChar(',', replaceAll(replaceAll(replaceAll(toString($container.image.name), '[', ''), ']', ''), '\'', '')), coalesce(nullIf(attributes_string['container.image.name'], ''), nullIf(attributes_string['image'], ''), 'unknown'))) GROUP BY image) SELECT coalesce(nullIf(l.attributes_string['container.image.name'], ''), nullIf(l.attributes_string['image'], ''), 'unknown') AS "Image", count() AS "Vulnerabilities" FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 l INNER JOIN latest_scan_per_image s ON coalesce(nullIf(l.attributes_string['container.image.name'], ''), nullIf(l.attributes_string['image'], ''), 'unknown') = s.image AND l.timestamp = s.latest_ts WHERE l.ts_bucket_start BETWEEN $start_timestamp - 1800 AND $end_timestamp AND l.resource.`service.name`::String = 'trivy-scan' AND l.attributes_string['event.name'] = 'security.vulnerability' AND l.attributes_string['event.domain'] = 'security' AND (has(splitByChar(',', replaceAll(replaceAll(replaceAll(toString($severity), '[', ''), ']', ''), '\'', '')), '__all__') OR has(splitByChar(',', replaceAll(replaceAll(replaceAll(toString($severity), '[', ''), ']', ''), '\'', '')), '__all_') OR has(splitByChar(',', replaceAll(replaceAll(replaceAll(toString($severity), '[', ''), ']', ''), '\'', '')), upper(coalesce(nullIf(l.attributes_string['severity'], ''), nullIf(l.attributes_string['vulnerability.severity'], ''), nullIf(l.severity_text, ''), 'UNKNOWN')))) GROUP BY "Image" ORDER BY "Vulnerabilities" DESC LIMIT 20

widgets.title: Top Images by Vuln Count (Last Scan)

widgets.description: Bar graph of severity counts from the latest scan per image.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: WITH latest_scan_per_image AS (SELECT coalesce(nullIf(attributes_string['container.image.name'], ''), nullIf(attributes_string['image'], ''), 'unknown') AS image, max(timestamp) AS latest_ts FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE ts_bucket_start BETWEEN $start_timestamp - 1800 AND $end_timestamp AND timestamp >= $start_timestamp_nano AND timestamp <= $end_timestamp_nano AND resource.`service.name`::String = 'trivy-scan' AND attributes_string['event.name'] = 'security.scan.summary' AND attributes_string['event.domain'] = 'security' AND ((has(splitByChar(',', replaceAll(replaceAll(replaceAll(toString($container.image.name), '[', ''), ']', ''), '\'', '')), '__all__') OR has(splitByChar(',', replaceAll(replaceAll(replaceAll(toString($container.image.name), '[', ''), ']', ''), '\'', '')), '__all_')) OR has(splitByChar(',', replaceAll(replaceAll(replaceAll(toString($container.image.name), '[', ''), ']', ''), '\'', '')), coalesce(nullIf(attributes_string['container.image.name'], ''), nullIf(attributes_string['image'], ''), 'unknown'))) GROUP BY image) SELECT toFloat64(count()) AS value, now() AS ts FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 l INNER JOIN latest_scan_per_image s ON coalesce(nullIf(l.attributes_string['container.image.name'], ''), nullIf(l.attributes_string['image'], ''), 'unknown') = s.image AND l.timestamp = s.latest_ts WHERE l.ts_bucket_start BETWEEN $start_timestamp - 1800 AND $end_timestamp AND l.resource.`service.name`::String = 'trivy-scan' AND l.attributes_string['event.name'] = 'security.vulnerability' AND l.attributes_string['event.domain'] = 'security' AND upper(coalesce(nullIf(l.attributes_string['severity'], ''), nullIf(l.attributes_string['vulnerability.severity'], ''), nullIf(l.severity_text, ''), 'UNKNOWN')) = 'CRITICAL'

widgets.title: Severity Bar (Latest Scan)
